column2: Verify System Prevents Activation of Battery-Fire User Stories
column3: ['Navigate to the system interface and log in as a valid user. ', 'Identify and select one of the user stories related to battery-fire environmental risk on ground. ', 'Attempt to activate the selected user story. ']
column4: ['Successfully logged in as a valid user. ', 'Selected a user story related to battery-fire environmental risk on ground. ', 'The system displays an error message indicating that such activation is not allowed. ']
